summary: Searches a sorted range and returns the index of an exact match or the nearest valid fallback according to the configured bound policy.
signature_intent: Accepts a bounded search interval, target value, sorted collection, comparator, and bound policy; returns an index or -1.
behavior: Returns the inspected index immediately when the comparator reports equality.
Continues searching the upper portion when the target sorts after the inspected item and more than one position remains.
Continues searching the lower portion when the target sorts before the inspected item and more than one position remains.
In upper-bound mode, returns the nearest not-less-than index when it is within the collection.
In non-upper-bound mode, returns the nearest not-greater-than index when it is valid.
Returns -1 when the selected fallback position is outside the valid collection range.
edge_cases: An upper-bound fallback beyond the collection length returns -1.
A lower fallback before the start of the collection returns -1.
Adjacent search bounds stop recursion and force fallback selection.
forbidden_details: No original variable names, repository names, or source paths are included.
No incidental implementation details beyond externally visible behavior are included.
